## AI Video Creator v1.0.8

### Addon updates (Setup Hub)
- Fix **FFmpeg download 404** — manifest now uses live BtbN `latest` release URL
- Fix **scan shape bug** — `normalizeHostScan()` unwraps Setup Hub UI scan so check/update no longer false-report “Python not detected”

### Director render
- **Multi-seed GPU batches** — cancel and progress now track all spawned children, not just the last seed

### Setup & paths
- **Open-Sora default path** — `E:\Open-Sora` on Windows, `~/Open-Sora` on macOS/Linux (shared across scan, main, settings)
- **Suno Voice Style Generator** panel mounted again in the workspace

### Vocal mode alignment
- **`Silent visual`** and legacy **`Instrumental`** treated consistently across guided path, Suno rules, Co-Producer, and voice-style UI

### Project reset
- Reset now clears **Co-Producer LLM keys**, **Style-DNA Spotify secrets**, **custom presets**, **prompt history**, and **IndexedDB audio cache**

Installed **v1.0.7** apps should pick this up via GitHub auto-update, or download the new installer below.
